creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Since MINIMAL kernel configuration lacks "device md", I was curious if there's a way to boot my memory based systems without recompiling a new kernel.
There's geom_md.ko, which is nowhere documented.

md(4) was apporpriate for that I think.

In SYNOPSIS, under »device md«, the same mentioning of kernel modules like other pages do would fit:
Alternatively, to load the driver as a module at boot time, place the
following line in loader.conf(5):

   geom_md_load="YES"

Unfortunately I don't know anything of man page formatting nor do I know any tools to get started.
So this is just a report without patch.

-Harry
